creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 213162
py-osprofiler-2.9.0.patch

Hi,

attached is the patch that updates devel/py-osprofiler to 2.9.0.

Changes to the port:
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
* Make port concurrent safe as it installs binaries and documentation files outside Python's site-lib directory.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.3-RELEASE amd64 for each py27, py35, py36, py37 and py38 flavor) -> OK
- portlint -> OK
